problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Lattice-based. Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance directly addresses this.
